sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A mangte hong zongin hong zol ngeungeu,
Mual sang tung a lam a khial mite;
hong zuan un” hong cikik leuleu,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: sang tunga gamla ah pai ni,
Mawh nei mi tang dinga si Tuuno

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A mangte zongin Jesuh’ lamlak in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua bangin pai ni thupha nasem mi,
Khazih zui den ni, a ni sialin;
A mang mi lampi Jesuh lak ni.
